title: Limina TypeScript Configuration
description: TypeScript tsconfig.json with Limina graph governance options.

liminaOptions.description: Limina-specific options for this TypeScript project.

implicitRefs.description: Additional source tsconfig references that Limina should map into the generated declaration graph when static import analysis cannot prove an edge.

path.description: Path to another ordinary source tsconfig, relative to the tsconfig that declares this implicit reference.

reason.description: Human-readable reason for the implicit reference.

outputs.description: User-facing artifact output build options for this ordinary source tsconfig.

target.description: TypeScript target for generated artifact output builds.

declarationMap.description: Whether generated artifact output builds should emit declaration maps.

rootDir.description: Artifact build rootDir, relative to this tsconfig.

outDir.description: Artifact build outDir, relative to this tsconfig.

graphRules.description: Graph rule labels from limina.config.mts#graph.rules that apply to this declaration leaf.

generated.description: Internal Limina marker for generated tsconfig files.

checker.description: Internal Limina checker name for generated tsconfig files.

sourceConfig.description: Internal Limina source config pointer for generated declaration configs.
